title: Scaling Microservices with Kubernetes
description: A deep dive into orchestration patterns and best practices for managing high-scale microservices architectures using Kubernetes.

title: Modern State Management in React
description: Comparing Redux, Recoil, and Context API to find the best fit for your next application's complexity.

title: The Future of AI: LLMs and Beyond
description: Exploring generative models, the impact of Large Language Models on software development, and what's next for artificial intelligence.

title: Lunch Break
description: Time to refuel and network with other attendees.

title: Secure by Design: Building Robust APIs
description: Best practices for implementing Authentication, Authorization, and Data Integrity in modern REST and GraphQL APIs.

title: WebAssembly: High Performance in the Browser
description: How to bring high-performance C++, Rust, and Go code to the web using WebAssembly for compute-intensive tasks.

title: Optimizing Postgres for High Load
description: Advanced indexing strategies, query optimization techniques, and connection pooling for high-performance PostgreSQL databases.
